nasb.text: The bed is too short on which to stretch out, And the blanket is too small to wrap oneself in.

esv.text: For the bed is too short to stretch oneself on, and the covering too narrow to wrap oneself in.

cnv.text: 床鋪太短，人就不能伸直， 被窩太窄，就蓋不住全身。

ccb.text: 你们的床太小，不能舒身； 你们的被子太窄，不足裹身。

csbs.text: 床铺太短，伸不直身子； 被子太窄，裹不住全身。
